---
description: "Set up a new company interview prep workspace. Delegates to the company-setup skill."
agent: "agent"
argument-hint: "Company name and role (e.g., Google Staff Backend Engineer)"
---

Use the **company-setup** skill to set up this company's prep workspace. Read the skill's SKILL.md at `.github/skills/company-setup/SKILL.md` and follow its workflow exactly, using the templates in `.github/skills/company-setup/assets/`.
